files.notes: This file contains multiple articles merged together. The content includes stake presidents listing and a poem by Amy Kemp that appear to be part of the Semi-Centennial Review article. The file ends with organizational information about the Relief Society General Board.

files.notes: The file contains two complete articles. The first article 'When a Man Needs a Mother' appears to be missing its beginning and ends mid-sentence. The second article 'Intellectual Responsibility of Mothers' starts mid-sentence and continues to completion. Based on the table of contents, these should be separate articles with page numbers 258 and 266 respectively.
